title: KNA - Ashikaga
description: A modpack that simulates the anime Demon Slayer.
body:
## **What's in This Modpack:**

This modpack brings Demon Slayer content and various quality-of-life multiplayer mods into Minecraft. The main feature is Orca’s Kimetsu no Yaiba mod, which lets you play as either a Slayer or a Demon. As a Slayer, you can master different Breathing Styles like Water, Flame, Sun, Wind, and Sound, along with unique custom ones such as Bamboo and Cherry that don’t appear in the anime. If you choose to become a Demon, you’ll be able to use a variety of Blood Demon Arts inspired by some of the most iconic demons from the series. The pack also includes cosmetic and building mods to enhance your experience whether you want to show off your swords and armor or build a cozy home. While primarily made for multiplayer, it’s just as enjoyable in singleplayer if you’d rather play alone.

Discord Server for Ashikaga: [https://discord.gg/TRAtQcNdNS](https://discord.gg/TRAtQcNdNS)
##
